codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly addresses all four responsive layout requirements. Build and lint pass successfully. Touch targets meet 44px minimum, sidebar collapses on mobile, container class provides consistent spacing, and overflow-x-hidden prevents horizontal scroll.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker created new src/styles/globals.css file rather than modifying existing styles. The AGENTS.md Existing Assets rule says to 'reuse or refactor valuable existing WebPlatform assets instead of rebuilding blindly', but since this was a new file (not replacing an existing one), this appears acceptable.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: git show 78d32ba --stat shows src/styles/globals.css as new file (119 lines added)

sharedStateObservations.observation: frontend-worker skill was not found in .factory/skills/. Worker proceeded based on validation contract requirements (VAL-P2-RESP-001 through VAL-P2-RESP-004). This deviation was documented in skillFeedback.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: skillFeedback.followedProcedure: false, deviations documented the skill was not found

sharedStateObservations.observation: No issues found. Worker used standard npm scripts (npm run build, npm run lint) as defined in package.json and services.yaml.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker ran 'npm run build' and 'npm run lint' successfully

summary: The responsive-layout feature implementation passes review. All four validation assertions (VAL-P2-RESP-001 through VAL-P2-RESP-004) are properly addressed: sidebar collapses on mobile using lg:hidden classes, touch targets are 44x44px minimum for menu button and nav items, container class provides consistent spacing across breakpoints (640px, 768px, 1024px, 1280px), and overflow-x-hidden prevents horizontal scroll at any viewport. Build and lint both pass. The worker noted the frontend-worker skill was unavailable but proceeded correctly using validation contract specifications.
